---
title: "Team"
description: "Students and researchers I advise and mentor."
---

## Current Members

### PhD Students

- **Student Name** (2024 – present) *jointly with Prof. Co-Advisor (Dept.)*\
  *Topic:* research topic

### Masters Students

- **Student Name** (2025 – present)\
  *Topic:* thesis topic

### Undergraduates

- **Student Name** (2025 – present)\
  *Topic:* project topic

---

## Alumni

### PhD Students

- **Student Name** (2018 – 2024) *jointly with Prof. Co-Advisor (Dept.)*\
  *Topic:* thesis topic\
  *Current position:* role, organization

### Masters Students

- **Student Name** (2021 – 2023)\
  *Topic:* thesis topic\
  *Current position:* role, organization

### Undergraduates

- **Student Name** (2022 – 2023)\
  *Topic:* project topic\
  *Current position:* role, organization
